caption: A video clip features a gaming interface for "90+ ZERO CHILL PLAYER" with various numeric statistics and the text "ALL" and "BACK" visible on the screen. Centered is a digital trading card labeled "LOLB (92)" and "David MAYO," featuring a player in a red and gold football uniform with the text "MUTmas" below. A small inset video window in the lower-left corner shows a man with light-colored hair wearing a black t-shirt, positioned in a room with a decorated Christmas tree in the background. In the initial sequence, the man is shown with his arms raised and mouth open in a wide, excited expression. As the clip progresses, he maintains a surprised facial expression with his mouth open, though his arms eventually lower slightly. The background gaming interface and the digital player card remain static throughout the sequence.
